title: Smart Fellowship Program Graduation Ceremony: Empowering Women Leaders
content: Galgotias University recently celebrated the successful graduation of 22 outstanding female students from the Smart Fellowship Program, an initiative designed to empower women by enhancing their leadership skills, academic capabilities, and career readiness. The event was an inspiring celebration of achievement, resilience, and the power of education, with special guests Navya Naveli Nanda and Samyak Chakraborty sharing their insights on leadership and innovation. These 22 top-performing students received the Performer Badge, recognizing their dedication and hard work throughout the program. Their perseverance is a testament to the value of education, teamwork, and continuous learning. The Smart Fellowship Program aims to provide young women with the skills necessary to excel in the modern workforce. Participants who complete the program are awarded the Corporate Readiness Certificate from the Nimaya Foundation, which significantly boosts their prospects for jobs, internships, and higher-paying roles in reputed companies. This certification provides a crucial edge in a competitive job market, helping women secure better opportunities for career advancement. By equipping female students with the tools to succeed, the Smart Fellowship Program actively works to reduce gender disparities in education and employment, helping women break barriers and lead in their chosen fields. We are incredibly proud of our graduates and their accomplishments. Their journey reflects the power of education and leadership in driving social change, and they are now well-equipped to make a significant impact in their communities and professions.
